sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id INT, shape GEOMETRY, name VARCHAR(255), area FLOAT, perimeter FLOAT, precision FLOAT);
SELECT s1.id, s2.id FROM geo_shapes s1, geo_shapes s2 WHERE s1.id != s2.id AND bif:st_may_intersect(s1.shape, s2.shape) AND (s1.area * s2.perimeter) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS intersection_count FROM (SELECT s1.id AS id1, s2.id AS id2 FROM geo_shapes s1 JOIN geo_shapes s2 ON bif:st_may_intersect(s1.shape, s2.shape) GROUP BY s1.id, s2.id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS tmp;

WITH ShapeStats AS (SELECT id, area, perimeter, area * NULLIF(perimeter, 0) AS area_perimeter FROM geo_shapes) SELECT AVG(area_perimeter) AS avg_area_perimeter FROM ShapeStats WHERE area_perimeter IS NOT NULL;
SELECT s1.name, s2.name FROM geo_shapes s1 LEFT JOIN geo_shapes s2 ON bif:st_may_intersect(s1.shape, s2.shape) WHERE s1.area < (SELECT MAX(area) FROM geo_shapes) - 5*1.5;
SELECT id, shape FROM geo_shapes WHERE bif:st_may_intersect(shape, (SELECT shape FROM geo_shapes WHERE id = 3)) AND precision > (SELECT MIN(precision) FROM geo_shapes) ORDER BY perimeter * precision;
